# components

**Instance Property**

The entity’s list of components.

## Declaration

```swift
var components: [GKComponent] { get }
```

## Managing an Entity’s List of Components

- **addComponent(_:)**: Adds a component to the entity.

items.description: Adds a component to the entity.
items.name: addComponent(_:)
